flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Blue Cliff College-Metairie fell 65% between 2021 and 2024 (822 → 291).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Blue Cliff College-Metairie vs the 2018–2022 baseline (584 vs 818).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Blue Cliff College-Metairie rose 20% between 2010 and 2013 ($15.2k → $18.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Blue Cliff College-Metairie rose 20% between 2010 and 2013 ($15.2k → $18.2k).
